_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of supply chain risk management principles and practices
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model supply chain security, including risks in open-source model adoption, fine-tuning pipeline integrity, third-party dataset provenance, and model registry security controls.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI SP domain. Knowledge SP-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-K-011 (RM, cosine: 0.583), DA-K-014 (DA, cosine: 0.563).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.9/10 (raw 0.589). Shared vocabulary: [chain, knowledge, supply]. NICE-only terms [management, practices, principles, risk] vs WIDAI-only terms [adoption, controls, dataset, fine, integrity, model] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.885 (P=0.914, R=0.857). P exceeds R by 0.057 — the NICE element's 9 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Knowledge of supply chain risk management principles and practices" and "Knowledge of model supply chain security, including risks in open-source model a" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.600 ≈ STS 0.589 (gap 0.011). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [chain, knowledge, supply] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 18.5%. Shared tokens: [chain, knowledge, supply]. NICE-only: [management, practices, principles, risk]. WIDAI-only: [adoption, controls, dataset, fine, integrity, model].
